text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to come across Admire Vega
looking out towards the central plaza. Following
her gaze, I see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! O great sun! Illuminate me
further with thy brilliance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not right. Maybe a pose like this would
better demonstrate the sun's blessing? All right,
one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's observing T.M. Opera O. Later
on the same day, I catch sight of her attempting a
variety of things around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Get out, that's a lotta meat! Is today your cheat
day or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No. I'm trying to put on some muscle. A toned
core is pretty important for photo shoots and
stuff. Anyway, I'm gonna go get seconds.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Seconds? Of this? Oof...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Fifty-six... Fifty-seven... Come on! Fifty-nine!
And... sixty!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Sitting on my legs... for two hours straight...
they've gone totally—hng...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It looks so nice and fluffy. I need to get my
hands on it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If I study the plushie's smile, then maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time I come across her, she seems to have
her hands full.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On another day, I find her in the plaza looking
like she's deep in thought yet again. I can't help
but feel concerned, so I walk up to her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Uh... Yeah. I'm fine.

Huh? Really? Even though you were up late last
night mumbling to yourself while scrolling through
your phone?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This is about that modeling job to make
posters for that inn, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is, staying up late isn't good for you.
Everyone knows it's super-duper bad for your
skin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recall our meeting with the inn owner the other
day. It seems that all her actions up until now
were in preparation for the photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, thinking back to how she reacted that
day...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?
choice_data_list:
I'm surprised, because you didn't seem all too
excited.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, I agreed to it, and a job is a job.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I'm to do this, then I want to do the best I can.
That's all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... can I have some space, then?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Awww, looks like she gave us the cold
shoulder. ♪ Though I have to say... it's kinda not
fair.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That straightforward aloofness is her greatest
weapon, and she doesn't even realize it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega does indeed have some unusual
magnetism about the way she carries herself.
